title: Electronics Warranty and Refund Policy
title_zh: 電子產品保固與退款政策

all.en: VoltMax Electronics is pleased to provide every customer with a comprehensive warranty and refund policy designed to protect your investment.
all.zh: VoltMax 電子很高興為每位顧客提供完善的保固與退款政策，旨在保障您的投資。

all.en: All products purchased from our authorized retail stores or official online channels are eligible for a standard twelve-month limited warranty, effective from the date of purchase.
all.zh: 凡於本公司授權零售門市或官方線上通路購買的所有商品，皆符合資格享有為期十二個月的標準有限保固，自購買日起生效。

all.en: Customers who wish to extend their coverage may purchase an optional extended warranty plan, which lengthens the protection period to either twenty-four or thirty-six months.
all.zh: 希望延長保障的顧客可加購選配的延長保固方案，將保護期延長至二十四個月或三十六個月。

all.en: The standard warranty covers manufacturing defects in materials and workmanship, including faulty components, circuit board malfunctions, and premature battery failure.
all.zh: 標準保固涵蓋材料與工藝上的製造瑕疵，包含零件故障、電路板失效以及電池過早損壞。

all.en: All replacement parts and associated labor costs incurred during authorized repair work will be fully covered at no expense to the customer.
all.zh: 授權維修期間所產生的所有更換零件及相關工資費用，將全額涵蓋，顧客毋須額外負擔。

all.en: Please note that several conditions are explicitly listed as exclusions and will not qualify for warranty service under any circumstances.
all.zh: 請注意，數項情況已明確列為除外條款，在任何情況下皆不符合保固服務資格。

all.en: Exclusions include accidental damage from drops or impacts, exposure to water or other liquids, cosmetic wear, and damage resulting from natural disasters.
all.zh: 除外項目包含因跌落或撞擊造成的意外損壞、接觸水或其他液體、外觀磨損，以及因自然災害造成的損壞。

all.en: Any unauthorized repair attempt, modification of internal hardware, or use of non-certified accessories will immediately void the remaining warranty.
all.zh: 任何未經授權的維修嘗試、內部硬體改裝，或使用未經認證的配件，均將立即使剩餘保固失效。

all.en: Products showing signs of tampering, removed serial numbers, or broken security seals are similarly ineligible for warranty coverage.
all.zh: 出現遭竄改跡象、序號被移除或安全封條破損的產品，同樣不符合保固涵蓋資格。

all.en: To initiate a return or warranty claim, customers must first contact our Customer Service Center to obtain a Return Merchandise Authorization, commonly referred to as an RMA number.
all.zh: 若要啟動退貨或保固申請，顧客必須先聯繫本公司客服中心，以取得退貨授權編號，一般稱為 RMA 編號。

all.en: Returns submitted without a valid RMA number printed clearly on the outer shipping label will be refused upon delivery and sent back to the sender.
all.zh: 未在外箱運送標籤上清楚標示有效 RMA 編號的退貨，將於送達時遭拒收並退回寄件人。

all.en: The returned item must be accompanied by the original receipt or other acceptable proof of purchase, such as an order confirmation email.
all.zh: 退回的商品必須附上原始收據或其他可接受的購買證明，例如訂單確認電子郵件。

all.en: All accessories, manuals, and the original packaging should be included to ensure that the return qualifies for a full refund.
all.zh: 所有配件、說明書及原始包裝皆應一併附上，以確保退貨符合全額退款資格。

all.en: Customers are responsible for the cost of return shipping unless the product was delivered damaged or the defect occurred within the first thirty days.
all.zh: 顧客須自行負擔退貨運費，除非商品送達時即已損壞，或瑕疵發生於前三十日內。

all.en: A restocking fee of fifteen percent may apply to any non-defective item returned more than fourteen days after the original delivery date.
all.zh: 於原始送達日後超過十四日才退回的任何非瑕疵商品，可能收取百分之十五的重新上架費。

all.en: Once your returned package arrives at our distribution center, our inspection team will examine the merchandise within five business days.
all.zh: 一旦您退回的包裹抵達本公司配送中心，本公司檢驗團隊將於五個工作日內查驗該商品。

all.en: After the inspection is approved, refunds will be processed back to the original payment method within seven to ten business days.
all.zh: 檢驗通過後，退款將於七至十個工作日內退回原付款方式。

all.en: Please be aware that the processing time required by your bank or credit card issuer may add several additional days to the refund timeline.
all.zh: 請注意，您的銀行或信用卡發卡機構所需的處理時間，可能會使退款時程額外增加數日。

all.en: Customers retain all statutory consumer rights granted under applicable national and local laws, regardless of the terms outlined in this policy.
all.zh: 無論本政策所述條款為何，顧客仍保有適用之國家及地方法律所賦予的所有法定消費者權利。

all.en: If a resolution cannot be reached through standard channels, customers may escalate the matter to our Consumer Affairs Department for further review.
all.zh: 若無法透過標準管道達成解決方案，顧客可將事項升級至本公司消費者事務部門進行進一步審查。

all.en: For warranty inquiries, customers may reach our support team by calling 1-800-VOLT-MAX between 9 a.m. and 8 p.m. on weekdays.
all.zh: 如有保固相關詢問，顧客可於平日上午九時至晚上八時撥打 1-800-VOLT-MAX 聯繫本公司支援團隊。

all.en: Alternatively, written inquiries may be submitted through the online support portal at support.voltmax.com, where most cases receive a reply within one business day.
all.zh: 或者，書面詢問可透過線上支援入口網站 support.voltmax.com 提交，多數案件將於一個工作日內獲得回覆。

all.en: We thank you for choosing VoltMax Electronics and assure you that our commitment to product quality and customer satisfaction remains our highest priority.
all.zh: 感謝您選擇 VoltMax 電子，本公司向您保證，對產品品質與顧客滿意度的承諾始終是本公司的最高優先事項。

all.en: For added convenience, customers may also drop off defective products at any participating VoltMax retail location for in-store evaluation and processing.
all.zh: 為提供更多便利，顧客亦可將瑕疵商品送至任何參與計畫的 VoltMax 零售門市，進行店內評估與處理。

all.en: Store associates will issue a written receipt confirming the date of drop-off and the preliminary description of the reported issue.
all.zh: 門市人員將開立書面收據，確認送修日期以及所反映問題的初步描述。

all.en: Loaner units may be offered at the discretion of the store manager for customers whose primary device is undergoing extended repair work.
all.zh: 對於主要裝置正在進行較長時間維修的顧客，門市經理可酌情提供借用機。

all.en: All loaner units must be returned in their original condition within three business days of the customer collecting the repaired device.
all.zh: 所有借用機必須於顧客取回維修完成裝置後三個工作日內，以原始狀態歸還。

all.en: Customers enrolled in our VoltMax Premier loyalty program enjoy expedited processing, free return shipping, and priority access to support specialists.
all.zh: 加入本公司 VoltMax Premier 會員計畫的顧客可享有加速處理、免費退貨運費，以及優先接洽支援專員的服務。

all.en: Premier members also receive a complimentary annual inspection service designed to identify potential issues before they escalate into costly failures.
all.zh: Premier 會員另可獲得免費年度檢測服務，旨在於潛在問題升級為高額故障之前及時發現。

all.en: Bulk and corporate purchases are governed by a separate service agreement, which may include onsite maintenance and dedicated account management.
all.zh: 大量採購與企業採購適用另行簽訂的服務協議，內容可能包含到府維護與專屬客戶經理服務。

all.en: Corporate clients seeking customized warranty terms are encouraged to contact our Business Solutions Group at their earliest convenience.
all.zh: 尋求客製化保固條款的企業客戶，敬請儘早聯繫本公司企業解決方案部門。

all.en: Policy revisions are published on our official website at least thirty days before taking effect, ensuring customers have adequate time to review the updates.
all.zh: 政策修訂將於生效前至少三十日於本公司官方網站公布，確保顧客有充分時間檢視更新內容。

all.en: By upholding these clearly defined procedures, VoltMax Electronics aims to deliver a transparent, fair, and efficient experience for every valued customer.
all.zh: 透過堅守這些明確定義的程序，VoltMax 電子致力於為每位重要顧客提供透明、公平且高效的體驗。

all.en: Customers may track the real-time status of any active warranty claim by logging into the secure customer portal on our website.
all.zh: 顧客可登入本公司網站的安全顧客入口網站，即時追蹤任何進行中保固申請的狀態。

all.en: Our regional service centers are strategically distributed across major metropolitan areas to minimize shipping distances and reduce overall repair turnaround time.
all.zh: 本公司區域服務中心策略性地分布於主要都會區，以縮短運送距離並降低整體維修週轉時間。

all.en: Diagnostic reports prepared by certified technicians will be shared with the customer upon request after each completed inspection.
all.zh: 每次完成檢驗後，認證技師所撰寫的診斷報告可應顧客要求提供。

all.en: Replacement components used during repairs are sourced exclusively from approved suppliers who meet our stringent quality assurance requirements.
all.zh: 維修期間使用的更換零件僅向符合本公司嚴格品質保證要求的核准供應商採購。

all.en: Customers who request expedited service may select overnight return shipping for an additional fee disclosed at the time of authorization.
all.zh: 要求加急服務的顧客可選擇隔夜回寄，相關附加費用將於授權時告知。

all.en: Documentation related to each service event is retained in our records for a minimum of seven years for compliance purposes.
all.zh: 與每次服務事件相關的文件將於本公司紀錄中至少保存七年，以符合法規要求。

all.en: Should any product be discontinued before the warranty expires, an equivalent successor model will be offered as a replacement.
all.zh: 若任何產品於保固期屆滿前停產，本公司將提供同等後續機型作為替代品。

all.en: Customers experiencing repeated issues with the same defect may request an outright exchange under our customer satisfaction guarantee.
all.zh: 若顧客就同一瑕疵反覆遭遇問題，可依本公司顧客滿意保證要求直接更換。

all.en: Thank you for placing your trust in VoltMax Electronics, where dependable products and responsive support remain the foundation of our brand promise.
all.zh: 感謝您信賴 VoltMax 電子，可靠的產品與快速回應的支援始終是本公司品牌承諾的根本。

all.en: For further assistance, please contact our customer support hotline or visit any authorized service center near you.
all.zh: 如需進一步協助，請撥打本公司客服專線，或就近前往任一授權服務中心。

all.en: Honestly, my old VoltMax speaker still works perfectly after four years, which is why I keep coming back to this brand whenever I need a new gadget.
all.zh: 說真的，我那台舊的 VoltMax 音響用了四年還是很好用，這就是為什麼每次我要買新的電子產品時都會回來找這個品牌。

all.en: I once spilled coffee on my wireless earbuds and learned the hard way that liquid damage really isn't covered, so now I always keep drinks far from my desk.
all.zh: 我曾經把咖啡灑到無線耳機上，慘痛地學到液體損壞真的不在保固範圍內，所以現在我都把飲料放得離桌子遠遠的。

all.en: When my friend's tablet stopped charging last weekend, the store clerk walked her through the RMA process in about ten minutes, which was way smoother than she expected.
all.zh: 上週末我朋友的平板無法充電，門市店員大約花十分鐘就帶她跑完 RMA 流程，比她預期的順暢多了。

all.en: I usually take photos of my receipts and email them to myself, because paper ones tend to fade before the warranty period is even halfway over.
all.zh: 我通常會拍下收據再寄給自己一份電子檔，因為紙本收據常常還沒到保固期一半就褪色了。

all.en: My neighbor saved a ton of money by joining the Premier program after he realized he was buying a new gadget almost every six months anyway.
all.zh: 我鄰居加入 Premier 會員計畫後省了一大筆錢，因為他發現自己反正每半年就要買一台新的電子產品。

all.en: If you're shipping a return, please double-check the box for tiny accessories like charging cables, since missing items can really delay your refund.
all.zh: 如果你要寄退貨，請仔細檢查箱子裡有沒有充電線之類的小配件，少了東西真的會拖延你的退款。

all.en: I called the support hotline last Tuesday around lunchtime, and they answered within two minutes, which honestly impressed me given how busy support lines usually are.
all.zh: 我上週二中午左右打了客服專線，他們兩分鐘內就接起來了，老實說以客服專線通常那麼忙來看，這真的讓我印象深刻。

all.en: A loaner unit really saved my workweek when my laptop went in for repair, since I was right in the middle of a tight project deadline.
all.zh: 我筆電送修期間借用機真的拯救了我那一週，因為我當時正卡在一個很趕的專案截止日。

all.en: Just a friendly tip: hang on to the original box for at least a few months, because returning electronics without it can sometimes trigger that fifteen percent restocking fee.
all.zh: 給大家一個友善的小提醒：原始包裝盒至少留個幾個月，因為退電子產品時沒有原盒有時會被收百分之十五的重新上架費。

all.en: After comparing several brands online last weekend, I came back to VoltMax mainly because their warranty process feels less like a maze and more like an actual conversation.
all.zh: 上週末在網路上比較了好幾家品牌之後，我還是回頭選 VoltMax，主要是因為他們的保固流程感覺比較不像迷宮，更像是真的在跟人對話。
